calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The Bank and its Counsel are commended for their candor and good conduct. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
